title: Nachbiy #5147
definition:
Nahbi = "hidden"

 1) son of Vophsi, a Naphtalite, and one of the 12 spies sent to spy
    out the promised land
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nahbi = "hidden"

 1) son of Vophsi, a Naphtalite, and one of the 12 spies sent to spy
    out the promised land

    NASB:  a Naphtalite
